SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-11-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Maria Ramirez, Plaintiff/Respondent, appears in pro per
Raul Amilcar Vasquez, Defendant/Appellant, appears in pro per

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Both parties have signed the Stipulation to Use Judge Pro Tem.

Maria Ramirez testifies under oath and is assisted by a Spanish Interpreter Sandra Gonzales.

Raul A. Vasquez testifies under oath on his own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. No evidence is retained.

JPT David Edward May, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (525)
